name: Pearl Gull Iron Limited
description: Pearl Gull Iron Limited is an Australia-based iron ore exploration and development company focused on the exploration, development, and commercialization of high-grade iron ore mineralization. The company holds a significant and strategic tenure position on Cockatoo Island, located in Western Australia, which is known for its historical iron ore production. By leveraging its mining titles over key areas such as the Switch Pit, North Bay, and Magazine Pit, Pearl Gull Iron aims to unlock the value of these mineral assets through targeted exploration programs and development initiatives within the Australian resources sector.
